repos.name: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
repos.desc: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

repos.name: affaan-m/ECC
repos.desc: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

repos.name: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
repos.desc: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

repos.name: anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins
repos.desc: Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork

repos.name: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
repos.desc: 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0

repos.name: hardikpandya/stop-slop
repos.desc: A skill file for removing AI tells from prose

repos.name: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
repos.desc: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

repos.name: DigitalPlatDev/FreeDomain
repos.desc: DigitalPlat FreeDomain: Free Domain For Everyone

repos.name: jellyfin/jellyfin
repos.desc: The Free Software Media System - Server Backend & API

repos.name: Axorax/awesome-free-apps
repos.desc: Curated list of the best free apps for PC and mobile

repos.name: twentyhq/twenty
repos.desc: The open alternative to Salesforce, designed for AI.

repos.name: Open-Dev-Society/OpenStock
repos.desc: OpenStock is an open-source alternative to expensive market platforms. Track real-time prices, set personalized alerts, and explore detailed company insights — built openly, for everyone, forever free.

repos.name: thedotmack/claude-mem
repos.desc: Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More

repos.name: st-tech/ppf-contact-solver
repos.desc: A contact solver for physics-based simulations involving 👚 shells, 🪵 solids and 🪢 rods.
